name: Card Carousel
description: A sleek rotating card display that showcases multiple content pieces in an organized, professional layout. Perfect for corporate websites displaying product features, client testimonials, or service offerings with a clean, trustworthy aesthetic.

name: Horizontal Scroll Carousel
description: A sleek horizontal scrolling carousel that showcases featured content with bold typography and generous spacing. Perfect for creative agencies, media companies, and modern e-commerce brands displaying portfolios or product collections with editorial flair.

name: Swipe Carousel
description: A clean, swipeable carousel with minimal styling that showcases content through smooth horizontal navigation. Perfect for professional service firms and modern businesses displaying product features, client testimonials, or key capabilities.

name: Contact Locations with Map
description: A sophisticated contact section featuring an integrated map display alongside location details, designed for professional service firms and corporate businesses with multiple office locations that need to convey trustworthiness and accessibility.

name: Contact Form with Shapes
description: A modern contact form enhanced with geometric shapes and editorial styling, designed for corporate businesses seeking to capture leads while maintaining a professional yet approachable brand presence.

name: CTA Collage Duo
description: A dynamic two-panel call-to-action layout that combines bold typography with editorial-style imagery, perfect for creative agencies and lifestyle brands looking to make an energetic brand statement while capturing leads.

name: Editorial Split CTA
description: A bold split-layout call-to-action that combines editorial-style content with a prominent action button, designed for professional services and B2B companies that need to build trust while driving conversions. The asymmetrical design balances detailed messaging with clear next steps.

name: CTA Image Backdrop
description: A sophisticated call-to-action that overlays text on a full-width background image, creating an editorial magazine-like aesthetic perfect for luxury brands and premium service providers wanting to combine compelling visuals with clear action prompts.

name: FAQ Accordion
description: A clean, collapsible FAQ section with modern typography and subtle animations that builds customer trust through organized, easily accessible information. Perfect for SaaS companies, professional services, and corporate websites needing to address common questions efficiently.

name: FAQ Minimal
description: A clean, text-focused FAQ section with generous whitespace and simple typography that builds trust through clarity. Perfect for professional services, SaaS platforms, and corporate websites where credibility matters more than flashy design.

name: FAQ Solutions
description: A bold, editorial-style FAQ section with modern typography and dynamic layouts that builds trust through clear, energetic presentation of common questions and answers. Perfect for tech companies, agencies, and professional services that want to showcase expertise while maintaining an approachable, confident brand voice.

name: Pulse Editorial Footer
description: A clean, magazine-style footer with refined typography and minimal visual elements that builds credibility for editorial websites, publishing platforms, and content-focused businesses requiring professional authority.

name: Sticky Reveal Footer
description: A modern footer that elegantly reveals itself as users scroll, featuring clean typography and minimal design elements. Perfect for editorial sites, professional services, and brands seeking a sophisticated, trustworthy presence.

name: Bold Editorial Hero
description: A magazine-inspired hero section with sophisticated typography and editorial layout that positions brands as authoritative industry leaders. Perfect for luxury businesses, professional services, and publications seeking to establish credibility and gravitas.

name: Geometric Hero
description: A clean, geometric hero section with structured layouts and minimal styling that builds trust through professional design. Perfect for corporate websites, B2B services, and tech companies seeking a sophisticated, authoritative first impression.

name: Parallax Images Hero
description: A modern hero section featuring parallax scrolling images that creates dynamic visual depth and movement. Perfect for creative agencies, portfolios, and media companies wanting to make a bold first impression with sophisticated visual storytelling.

name: Shuffle Cards Hero
description: A dynamic hero section featuring animated card elements that shuffle or rotate to showcase multiple key messages or services. Perfect for creative agencies, tech startups, and innovative businesses that want to demonstrate versatility and capture attention with interactive visual storytelling.

name: Split Image Hero
description: A split-screen hero section that pairs impactful imagery with headline content, designed for professional service firms and corporate brands seeking an elegant, editorial-style first impression.

name: Card Grid
description: A dynamic grid layout that showcases multiple content blocks with consistent spacing and visual hierarchy, perfect for businesses displaying product catalogs, team profiles, or service offerings with professional appeal.

name: Simple Grid
description: A clean, evenly-spaced grid layout that organizes content into structured columns, perfect for professional service firms and B2B companies showcasing their key offerings or process steps.

name: Author Split
description: A clean split-layout component that pairs professional headshots with biographical content, perfect for editorial sites, consulting firms, and creative agencies showcasing their team or founder stories.

name: Editorial Framed Split
description: A refined split layout featuring framed content sections that creates editorial-style hierarchy, perfect for professional services and established brands showcasing their story or key features with understated elegance.

name: Icon List Split
description: A two-column layout that pairs descriptive content with organized icon lists, perfect for professional service firms and B2B companies showcasing their key features, services, or step-by-step processes.

name: Image Text
description: A balanced split-layout component that pairs compelling imagery with descriptive text, ideal for professional service firms and corporate websites showcasing key features or company information.

name: Statement Split
description: A clean two-column layout that elegantly separates compelling copy from supporting visuals, perfect for luxury brands and professional services showcasing their story or key features with sophisticated restraint.

name: Parallax Content

fields.name: content
fields.description: Below-fold content for this section. Composer nests another component here (e.g. ImageText, CardGrid, IconListSplit) — content is not a text/image slot.

description: A sophisticated parallax scrolling component that creates depth and visual interest while showcasing key content sections. Perfect for creative agencies, design studios, and modern businesses wanting to highlight their services or company story with dynamic, engaging motion effects.

name: Sticky Cards

fields.name: content
fields.description: Card body. Composer nests another component here (e.g. ImageText, CardGrid, IconListSplit) — content is not a text/image slot.

description: A dynamic card layout that remains fixed during scroll to showcase key features or services with bold typography and editorial-style presentation. Perfect for professional service firms and agencies that need to communicate their process or capabilities with energy and authority.

name: Pill Glass Navbar
description: A sleek navigation bar with pill-shaped glass elements that creates a refined, editorial aesthetic perfect for professional service firms, design agencies, and premium content publishers seeking an understated yet sophisticated header.

name: Sticky Navbar
description: A fixed navigation bar that remains visible while scrolling, featuring clean typography and subtle styling perfect for corporate websites and professional services that need consistent access to key menu items.

name: Count-Up Stats
description: A clean, animated statistics display that reveals key numbers through count-up animations, perfect for corporate websites and professional service firms showcasing achievements, metrics, or company milestones.

name: Infinite Scroll
description: A continuously scrolling testimonial component with bold typography and editorial spacing that creates dynamic social proof. Perfect for tech companies and agencies wanting to showcase extensive client feedback without pagination interruptions.

name: Stacked Split
description: A vertically stacked testimonial layout that presents customer quotes with elegant typography and structured spacing, ideal for professional services and B2B companies showcasing client credibility.

name: Stagger Fan
description: A dynamic testimonial layout with staggered cards arranged in a fan pattern, perfect for creative agencies and lifestyle brands wanting to showcase customer feedback with visual energy and personality.
